title: taczaddonsfix
description: taczaddonsfix has fixed two issues: one where taczaddon version 1.1.6 cannot use ammunition from Sophisticated Backpacks on servers, and another where pump-action weapons cannot directly use ammunition from Sophisticated Backpacks.
body: taczaddonsfix has fixed two issues: one where taczaddon version 1.1.6 cannot use ammunition from Sophisticated Backpacks on servers, and another where pump-action weapons cannot directly use ammunition from Sophisticated Backpacks.
